name: Stereotypically Evil Laughter
timing: Play at the start of an Arcane Ability action, before Arcane Cards are drawn.
description: If the Arcane Ability is made by a friendly character, gain +2 Arcane Stat for the duration of the action. If the Arcane Ability is made by an enemy character, the enemy loses -2 Arcane Stat for the duration of the action. If at least one friendly *Elrich* is in play, gain/lose +/-3 Arcane Stat instead of +/-2.
